name: Daytonatti
author: soccerjonj
description:
Custom map of the greater Cincinnati and Dayton, Ohio area and surrounding areas such as Springfield, Oxford, and more.

Generated using 2023 LODES Census Data and added demand for the following:

Universities: Miami University, University of Dayton, University of Cincinnati, UC Blue Ash College, Xavier University, Mount St. Joseph University, Wright State University, Northern Kentucky University, Cincinnati State, Galen College of Nursing-Cincinnati, Kettering College, Sinclair Community College, Clark State College, Cedarville University, Central State University, Wittenberg University

Entertainment: Paycor Stadium, Great American Ball Park, TQL Stadium,  Heritage Bank Center, Nippert Stadium, Fifth Third Arena, University of Dayton Arena, Day Air Ballpark, Welcome Stadium, Truist Arena, Kings Island, Scene75 Entertainment Center, Belterra Park Cincinnati, Turfway Park Racing & Gaming, Cincinnati Zoo & Botanical Garden, Newport Aquarium, Krohn Conservatory, Hueston Woods State Park, Caesar Creek State Park, National Museum of the US Air Force, Cincinnati Museum Center, Cincinnati Art Museum, The Dayton Art Institute, Carillon Historical Park, Boonshoft Museum of Discovery, Cincinnati Music Hall, Aronoff Center for the Arts, Riverbend Music Center
